content_of_post_to_answer: What is the biggest reason people never change their lives?
answer: People often think they avoid change because they lack discipline, but many are actually protecting a familiar identity. A new life requires giving up old explanations, habits, and even relationships that once provided safety. I've explored this pattern in more detail on my profile for anyone curious about the deeper psychology behind it. Real change rarely begins when someone wants a better outcome; it begins when staying the same becomes harder than becoming different.
